{{CargoRelic
|name=Tomb Raider’s Talisman
|class_id=21857
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Cao Cao’s geomantic theft. Nine dragon-vein amulets forged through 800 days of subterranean theft.
|fame=54
|art=43
|fth=40
|civ=71
|tech=35
|ss1=Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail RUSH +3<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss2=Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +4<br>Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail RUSH +4<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss3=Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +5<br>Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail RUSH +5<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss4=Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +7<br>Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail RUSH +7<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss5=Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +9<br>Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail RUSH +9<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss7=Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail ATK +9<br>Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail RUSH +9<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200<br>Snail ATK +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Biozilla skill II.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion ATK +3%
|skill2=[[File:Biozilla skill II.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: This Relic's CIV +10
}}
